sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Western Digital (WDC) Valuation Check After Strong Recent Share Price Momentum
feed.summary: Western Digital (WDC) has seen significant share price appreciation, raising questions about its current valuation. While the stock has shown strong momentum with double-digit gains over recent months, a narrative-based fair value estimate places it at US$187, suggesting it is modestly overvalued compared to its current price of US$200.46. Analysts have raised this fair value due to strong demand and improved pricing, but risks tied to hyperscale customers and new HDD technologies remain.

feed.title: |【即時新聞】First Trust New Constructs Core Earnings Leaders ETF 宣布季度分配
feed.summary: |First Trust New Constructs Core Earnings Leaders ETF (FTCE) has announced a quarterly distribution of $0.0323 per share, payable on December 31, 2025, to shareholders of record as of December 12, 2025. The ex-dividend date is also December 12, 2025. The ETF's stock price saw a slight increase of 0.20% at yesterday's close, despite a significant 81.29% drop in trading volume.

feed.title: CoStar Group (NASDAQ:CSGP) Reaches New 1-Year Low Following Analyst Downgrade
feed.summary: CoStar Group (NASDAQ:CSGP) hit a new 52-week low of $57.01 after Keefe, Bruyette & Woods lowered its price target from $100 to $75, while maintaining an outperform rating. Other firms also adjusted their targets downward, leading to a MarketBeat consensus of "Moderate Buy" with an $84.81 target. Despite strong revenue growth and a $1.5 billion share repurchase authorization, the company faces mixed valuation dynamics with an unusually high P/E ratio.

feed.title: APi Group: An Interesting Safe Player (NYSE:APG)
feed.summary: APi Group has shown strong performance in 2025, driven by accelerating organic growth and ambitious financial targets for 2028, leading to a significant re-rating of its share price. The company aims for $10 billion in revenues and 16% EBITDA margins by 2028, supported by a history of both organic and M&A growth. Despite its shares nearly doubling and a 20x earnings multiple, the valuation is considered reasonable due to high-single-digit organic growth and strong execution.

feed.title: Keeping Seniors Safe, Connected, and Independent at Home with Arlo
feed.summary: Arlo Technologies is providing smart home security solutions designed to help seniors age independently at home. Their products offer easy-to-use features like wire-free setup, remote check-ins for family, two-way communication, and AI-powered smart alerts for enhanced safety and peace of mind. Arlo aims to support the well-being of older adults by offering non-invasive technology that respects their independence while ensuring they remain connected and secure.

feed.title: Enphase Energy Begins U.S. Production of GaN-Powered IQ9N-3P Commercial Microinverters for 480V Solar Projects
feed.summary: Enphase Energy has started U.S. production of its new GaN-powered IQ9N-3P Commercial Microinverter, designed for 480V solar projects. This microinverter helps commercial solar installations meet Foreign Entity of Concern (FEOC) compliance and domestic content requirements while offering enhanced efficiency and simplified system design. Its U.S. manufacturing also makes eligible projects qualify for domestic content bonus tax credits.

feed.title: Teledyne Marine Upgrades Industry-Standard HydroPACT 440 System
feed.summary: Teledyne Marine has launched the HydroPACT 440 MK2, an upgraded version of its subsea pipe and cable tracking system. The system features new hardware, including a titanium subsea housing for reduced weight and increased depth rating, and modernized software compatible with Windows 11. It aims to provide continuity and future-proofing while maintaining the familiar operability for offshore personnel.

feed.title: Trade of The Day – Oracle Corp (NYSE: ORCL)
feed.summary: Phillip Securities Research has issued a "TECHNICAL BUY" rating for Oracle Corp (NYSE: ORCL). The report provides specific buy, stop-loss, and take-profit prices, indicating a potential upside for investors. Access to the full report requires logging in, as it is premium content.

feed.title: NetApp (NTAP) Outpaces Stock Market Gains: What You Should Know
feed.summary: NetApp (NTAP) shares rose 1.56% in the recent trading session, outperforming the S&P 500, Dow, and Nasdaq. The company is projected to report an EPS of $2.07 for the upcoming quarter, an 8.38% increase year-over-year, and revenue of $1.69 billion. Analysts' positive revisions to estimates, along with NetApp's Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) and attractive valuation metrics like a Forward P/E of 13.38, suggest potential for continued performance.

feed.title: Emcor Group (EME) Beats Stock Market Upswing: What Investors Need to Know
feed.summary: Emcor Group (EME) closed with a +2.23% gain, outperforming the S&P 500. The company is expected to report strong EPS and revenue growth in its upcoming earnings disclosure, with analysts showing a favorable outlook. Despite trading at a slight premium, the Zacks Rank currently rates Emcor Group as a #3 (Hold).

feed.title: Energy Transfer LP (ET) Outpaces Stock Market Gains: What You Should Know
feed.summary: Energy Transfer LP (ET) stock closed up 1.12% at $17.15, outperforming the S&P 500's daily gain. The company is anticipated to report earnings of $0.36 per share, a 24.14% year-over-year growth, and revenue of $26.11 billion for the upcoming release. With a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold) and a Forward P/E ratio of 11.04, ET appears to be an attractive investment compared to its industry.

feed.title: KLA (KLAC) Exceeds Market Returns: Some Facts to Consider
feed.summary: KLA (KLAC) has demonstrated strong market performance, with its stock up 2.01% in the latest session and an impressive 17.26% gain over the past month, outperforming both the S&P 500 and the Computer and Technology sector. The company is anticipated to report an increase in EPS and revenue for its upcoming earnings release. KLA holds a Zacks Rank of #2 (Buy), reflecting analysts' favorable outlook, though its Forward P/E ratio is currently higher than its industry average.

feed.title: Intuit (INTU) Stock Sinks As Market Gains: What You Should Know
feed.summary: Intuit (INTU) stock experienced a decline of -1.76% in its latest trading session, underperforming the broader market gains. Despite this, analysts project positive year-over-year growth for the company's upcoming earnings report, with expected increases in earnings per share and revenue. The stock currently holds a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold) and is trading at a premium compared to its industry's average Forward P/E ratio.

feed.title: Gilead Sciences (GILD) Surpasses Market Returns: Some Facts Worth Knowing
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences (GILD) closed up 1.23% at $122.59, outperforming the S&P 500. The company's upcoming earnings report is highly anticipated, with projected EPS of $1.87 and revenue of $7.57 billion. Despite a recent slight decrease in the Zacks Consensus EPS estimate, Gilead holds a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold) and trades at a Forward P/E of 14.19, a discount to its industry average.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips (COP) Stock Dips While Market Gains: Key Facts
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips (COP) shares closed down 2.06% at $95.50, underperforming the broader market. The company is set to release its Q4 2025 earnings on February 5, 2026, with analysts forecasting a 38.38% decrease in EPS and a 3.41% drop in revenue year-over-year. Despite recent positive analyst estimate revisions for other stocks often correlating with future performance, ConocoPhillips' Zacks Consensus EPS estimate has seen a slight decrease over the last 30 days, placing it at a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold).

feed.title: ICICI Bank Allots 1,185,510 Equity Shares Under Employee Stock Option Scheme
feed.summary: ICICI Bank has allotted 1,185,510 equity shares with a face value of ₹2.00 each under its Employee Stock Option Scheme-2000 on January 13, 2026. This allotment, approved by two Executive Directors with delegated authority, demonstrates the bank's commitment to employee compensation and regulatory compliance. The information has been communicated to both BSE and NSE, ensuring transparency in their employee compensation structure.

feed.title: Expedia Group Inc.: Can the Original Online Travel Giant Still Set the Pace?
feed.summary: Expedia Group Inc. is transforming itself into an AI-powered travel operating system, focusing on a unified tech stack, loyalty program (One Key), and B2B solutions to compete with Booking Holdings, Airbnb, and Google. The company is using generative AI for conversational trip planning and consolidating its loyalty programs across brands to enhance personalization and customer retention. This strategic shift aims to re-rate Expedia's stock as a scalable, high-margin travel operating platform rather than just a traditional online travel agency.

feed.title: Haymaker Acquisition Corp. 4 (NYSE:HYAC) Sees Large Drop in Short Interest
feed.summary: Haymaker Acquisition Corp. 4 (NYSE:HYAC) experienced a significant 90.6% drop in short interest during December, falling to just 80 shares by December 31st. The stock is currently trading near its 12-month high at $11.40, with institutional investors holding approximately 71.07% of shares. Despite a "Sell" rating from Weiss Ratings and MarketBeat's consensus, several institutional investors increased their stakes in the company.

feed.title: D.R. Horton Inc.: How America’s Volume Homebuilder Turned Scale Into a Housing Product Strategy
feed.summary: D.R. Horton Inc. has transformed homebuilding into a standardized, scalable product strategy, offering multi-tiered housing from entry-level to luxury. The company leverages segmentation, standardization, scale, and integrated services to deliver homes faster and more predictably than competitors. This approach addresses the U.S. housing shortage by optimizing for affordability and efficiency, impacting its market valuation positively as investors recognize its ability to adapt and maintain volume leadership.

feed.title: Visionary Holdings Inc. Reports Fiscal Year 2025 Annual Report
feed.summary: Visionary Holdings Inc. has released its Annual Report for fiscal year 2025, highlighting its strategic transformation from education and real estate to health management, anti-aging, and premium medical aesthetics, complemented by its AI-enabled education business. Despite a 46.2% revenue decrease to USD 5.04 million and a net loss of USD 15.75 million due to the transition, emerging health businesses contributed 21.1% of total revenue. The company is actively pursuing new growth avenues, strengthening corporate governance, and addressing liquidity pressures.

feed.title: FTA Aviation Series C Preferred Shares Remain A Hold Despite Juicy 8.1% (NASDAQ:FTAIN)
feed.summary: FTAI Aviation Preferred Series C shares (FTAIN) are advised to remain a hold, despite an 8.1% yield, due to a high probability of redemption in 2026. Redemption at par would reduce the effective annualized yield to 4.8%. The recommended strategy is to collect the two remaining dividends and then sell above $25 before the anticipated redemption, or hold until called.

feed.title: AXT (NASDAQ:AXTI) Stock Price Down 8.4% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: AXT (NASDAQ:AXTI) shares dropped 8.4% during mid-day trading on Monday, with approximately 5.42 million shares traded, significantly below its average daily volume. Analyst ratings for AXT are mixed, with an average "Hold" rating and an average price target of $13.75, while the company remains unprofitable despite exceeding recent EPS and revenue estimates. Insider selling has also occurred, with executives and directors selling shares valued at over $3.3 million in the past 90 days.

feed.title: Coeur Mining’s Pivotal Acquisition: Forging a North American Metals Powerhouse
feed.summary: Coeur Mining is pursuing a pivotal $7 billion acquisition of New Gold Inc., with shareholders voting on January 27th. This merger aims to create a significant North American metals producer, focusing on geopolitical stability and diversifying its portfolio with a substantial copper component. The combined entity is projected to achieve strong financial targets, potentially leading to inclusion in major market indices.

feed.title: CMC Q1 Fiscal 2026: Record Steel Margins & Construction Solutions EBITDA - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Commercial Metals Company (CMC) reported strong financial results for its first quarter ended November 30, 2025, with North America Steel Group's adjusted EBITDA increasing by 57.9% and the Construction Solutions Group achieving record first-quarter EBITDA, up 74.7% year-over-year. These improvements were driven by favorable market conditions, expanded margins, and successful acquisitions. The company holds a positive long-term outlook, anticipating continued growth from infrastructure demand and strategic initiatives despite expected seasonal softness in Q2.

feed.title: Net worth of new P&G CEO Shailesh Jejurikar could nearly double
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble's new CEO, Shailesh Jejurikar, has been given a significant performance incentive, including options on over 130,000 company stock shares. His net worth is projected to nearly double to over $28 million due to new stock grants and options. Jejurikar's compensation package includes a $1.6 million salary, potential incentive pay, and a long-term incentive award valued at $14 million.

feed.title: Exxon remains “interested” in sending assessment team to Venezuela- report (XOM:NYSE)
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil is reportedly still interested in sending an assessment team to Venezuela to evaluate oil infrastructure and other assets. This development follows recent outreach from U.S. President Donald Trump to oil executives. The information comes from an unnamed source cited by Reuters.

feed.title: General Motors CEO Mary Barra says she still believes in electric vehicles
feed.summary: General Motors CEO Mary Barra maintains her belief in electric vehicles despite the Trump administration eliminating EV tax credits, which cost GM $6 billion. She envisions a future where robust charging infrastructure and technological advancements, like AI and Google Gemini, make EVs more appealing and affordable to consumers. GM has also relocated its global headquarters to the historic Hudson's Detroit building to better suit its collaborative business structure.

feed.title: Wells Fargo reverses fraud decision days after WFAA report; grandmother gets nearly $15,000 back
feed.summary: Wells Fargo reversed its decision regarding a fraud case involving an 83-year-old Dallas woman, restoring her nearly $15,000 savings. This reversal occurred days after a WFAA report highlighted her 16-month struggle to resolve check fraud. The bank's change of heart comes after public attention was drawn to the case.

feed.title: Hinge Health: Strong Usage Momentum, Conservative Growth Expectations, and Competitive Moat Support Buy Rating
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley analyst Craig Hettenbach maintained a Buy rating on Hinge Health, Inc. Class A, setting a price target of $72.00. This rating is based on the company's strong usage momentum, with app downloads increasing 61% year-over-year in Q4, and conservative growth expectations for late 2025 and early 2026. Hettenbach also highlighted Hinge Health's competitive advantage in the digital musculoskeletal care space, underscoring his positive outlook for the stock.

feed.title: Grocery Outlet plans first Virginia store
feed.summary: Grocery Outlet Holding Corp. announced its first planned Virginia store in Falls Church, set to open on February 12th, marking its expansion into a 16th state. This expansion comes as the company faces financial difficulties, including a lowered fourth-quarter sales forecast due to delays in food assistance benefits during a government shutdown, impacting same-store sales and earnings per share. Despite positive foot traffic, the retailer has seen a decline in units per transaction and average price per item.

feed.title: Comtech CEO optimistic about 911 segment under Allerium name
feed.summary: Comtech President and CEO Ken Traub expressed optimism for the company's public-safety segment, now operating under the name Allerium. Traub believes Allerium is well-positioned to increase its market share in the 911 sector throughout 2026 and beyond due to technological advancements and financial stability. This outlook points to anticipated positive momentum for the segment.

feed.title: The Technical Signals Behind (MGRD) That Institutions Follow
feed.summary: This article analyzes the technical signals for Affiliated Managers Group Inc. 4.200% Junior Subordinated Notes Due 2061 (MGRD), indicating a neutral sentiment across all time horizons favoring sideways action. Institutional trading strategies are outlined, including position trading, momentum breakout, and risk hedging, alongside multi-timeframe signal analysis with support and resistance levels. The analysis, generated by AI models, also details key findings, risk-reward scenarios, and current price signals for MGRD.

feed.title: Ameriprise Welcomes Loveday Caruso Wealth Management Group From LPL Financial
feed.summary: Loveday Caruso Wealth Management Group, an advisory practice with $120 million in assets, has moved from LPL Financial to the independent channel of Ameriprise Financial. The team, led by Sean Loveday and Sarah Caruso, chose Ameriprise for its client-centered technology, enhanced operational efficiency, and strong home office support. This move enables the group to grow their business and improve the client experience, with Ameriprise continuing to attract experienced financial advisors.

feed.title: CoStar Group stock price target lowered to $75 by KBW on guidance
feed.summary: KBW lowered its price target for CoStar Group (NASDAQ:CSGP) to $75 from $100 while maintaining an Outperform rating. This adjustment follows CoStar's "disappointing" preliminary 2026 guidance and medium-term targets, though KBW believes these still indicate strong earnings expansion. Other financial institutions like Wells Fargo, BMO Capital, Citizens, Goldman Sachs, and BofA Securities have also adjusted their price targets for CoStar Group based on its recent financial guidance and strategic plans, particularly regarding Homes.com.

feed.title: Does Weakening Margins And Profitability Trends Change The Bull Case For Equifax (EFX)?
feed.summary: Equifax is facing pressure due to declining adjusted operating margins, lower return on invested capital, and lagging earnings per share growth, despite revenue increases. This has led analysts to reassess the company's investment narrative, with an average price target of US$265.43, down from previous estimates. Investors are now focused on Equifax's ability to control expenses and manage rising legal and compliance costs to support its long-term growth story.

feed.title: Erasca price target raised to $11 from $3 at Clear Street
feed.summary: Clear Street has increased its price target for Erasca (ERAS) from $3 to $11, reiterating a Buy rating, following promising early Phase 1 trial data for ERAS-0015. The drug showed clinical responses at a lower dose than a comparable treatment, daraxonrasib, across various tumor types and RAS mutations. Analysts noted the drug's clean safety profile and linear pharmacokinetics as key differentiators, suggesting potential superiority over RMC-6236 as a pan-RAS molecular glue.

feed.title: BioMarin hires AI leader to help accelerate rare disease therapies
feed.summary: BioMarin has appointed Arpit Davé as Executive Vice President, Chief Digital and Information Officer, effective January 12, 2026. Davé will lead the company's enterprise technology strategy, data science, and digital transformation, aiming to accelerate R&D, manufacturing, and commercial operations. With over 20 years of IT and AI experience in biopharma, including from Amgen, Bristol Myers Squibb, and Merck, his role is expected to drive innovation and support the delivery of life-changing rare disease therapies.

feed.title: CORT Investor ALERT: Corcept Therapeutics Inc. Investigated
feed.summary: Block & Leviton is investigating Corcept Therapeutics Inc. (Nasdaq: CORT) for potential securities law violations after its shares fell more than 50% on December 31, 2025. This drop occurred because the FDA issued a Complete Response Letter for relacorilant, citing a lack of sufficient evidence for a favorable risk-benefit assessment. Investors who purchased Corcept Therapeutics common stock and have incurred losses are urged to contact Block & Leviton to learn about recovering their losses.

feed.title: (DCBO) Strategic Equity Report (DCBO:CA)
feed.summary: This strategic equity report for Docebo Inc. (DCBO:CA) provides AI-generated trading signals and ratings. It includes short-term and long-term trading plans with buy and short recommendations, target prices, and stop losses. The article also lists numerous recent reports on Docebo Inc.

feed.title: VICI Properties (VICI) Target Lowered at Cantor Fitzgerald as 2026 REIT Outlook Improves
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald lowered its price target for VICI Properties (VICI) to $33 from $35 but maintained an Overweight rating, anticipating an improved outlook for US equity REITs in 2026 due to a more supportive macro environment and increased M&A activity. The firm highlights VICI's stable supply and demand, strong balance sheet, and a well-covered dividend, noting its fully leased portfolio with inflation-linked rent escalators. Despite the target cut, Cantor Fitzgerald sees potential for VICI's dividend yield to grow, adding to its appeal.

feed.title: Small and midsized businesses enter 2026 in growth mode, Citizens survey finds
feed.summary: A new survey from Citizens Financial Group Inc. indicates that small and middle-market businesses are entering 2026 with significantly increased confidence, planning to invest, hire, and expand. The Citizens Q1 2026 Business Pulse survey found that a high percentage of both middle-market and smaller businesses anticipate revenue growth and intend to deploy more capital and increase headcount. While talent and inflation remain concerns, business owners are adapting and viewing these as manageable challenges rather than impediments to growth.

feed.title: Charles River Laboratories Provides Business Updates
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories announced key strategic moves including the acquisition of K.F. (Cambodia) Ltd. to strengthen its DSA supply chain, and exercising an option to acquire PathoQuest SAS to enhance its NAMs capabilities. The company also appointed Dr. Namandjé Bumpus as Chief Scientific and Innovation Officer and provided a preliminary 2026 outlook, noting improved DSA demand trends. These initiatives aim to advance drug development solutions, optimize supply chains, and foster innovation in the biopharmaceutical industry.

feed.title: Best Buy Co. Inc. Stock: Quiet Strength Or Value Trap In A Cooling Electronics Cycle?
feed.summary: Best Buy Co. Inc. has demonstrated quiet strength, outperforming the retail sector despite macro headwinds, while trading at a conservative earnings multiple. The stock's recent upward trend prompts questions about whether it's a late-cycle opportunity or a value trap in a slowing consumer electronics market. Analysts remain cautiously optimistic, acknowledging strong execution and control while noting exposure to discretionary spending fluctuations.

feed.title: |【即時新聞】Main Buywrite ETF宣佈每月分配金，投資人需注意關鍵日期
feed.summary: |Main Buywrite ETF (BUYW) 宣布每單位將分配0.0716美元的每月分配金，預計於2025年12月29日支付。投資者需注意，符合資格的股東必須在2025年12月23日（即除息日）前登記在冊。該ETF的股價在消息公布後略有下跌，收盤價為14.27美元。

feed.title: TROOPS (NASDAQ:TROO) Stock Price Up 10.1% - Time to Buy?
feed.summary: TROOPS (NASDAQ:TROO) saw its stock price jump 10.1% to $5.12, although the low trading volume raises questions about the sustainability of the increase. Despite this surge, analyst sentiment remains negative, with a consensus "Sell" rating from MarketBeat and Weiss Ratings. The company operates in money lending, fintech, and real estate in Hong Kong and Australia, reporting $0.00 EPS on $3.81 million revenue in its last quarter.

feed.title: Banco Bradesco Renews Related-Party Merchant Services Agreement With Cielo
feed.summary: Banco Bradesco has renewed its merchant intermediation agreement with related-party Cielo on January 12, 2026. This annually auto-renewed contract, approved under internal governance procedures and market terms, reinforces the operational integration between Bradesco and Cielo. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates BBD as an Outperform, citing strong technical indicators, reasonable valuation, positive market momentum, and an attractive dividend yield.

feed.title: What To Expect From Home Bancshares's (HOMB) Q4 Earnings
feed.summary: Home Bancshares (HOMB) is set to release its Q4 earnings on Wednesday, with analysts expecting a 4.5% year-on-year revenue growth to $274 million and adjusted earnings of $0.60 per share. The company beat revenue expectations last quarter but has missed Wall Street's revenue estimates twice in the last two years. Investors are heading into earnings with a flat share price over the last month, and an average analyst price target of $33.13 against a current share price of $28.29.

feed.title: Huntington Bancshares acquires Atlanta M&A firm ahead of retail expansion
feed.summary: Huntington Bancshares has acquired Atlanta's M&A firm TM Capital. This acquisition comes after a previous failed attempt two years prior and is part of Huntington's strategic expansion in the Atlanta market, preceding a planned retail expansion. The article highlights this business move and upcoming local events.

feed.title: BigBear.ai (NYSE:BBAI) Shares Up 1.9% - What's Next?
feed.summary: BigBear.ai (NYSE:BBAI) shares increased by 1.9% on Monday, trading at $6.315 with approximately 62.6 million shares exchanged. The company has a market capitalization of $2.76 billion, with its stock hovering near its 50-day and 200-day moving averages. Analyst sentiment is mixed, with a consensus "Hold" rating and a target price of $6.00, while the company's fundamentals remain weak, showing unprofitability and declining revenue.

feed.title: Energy Transfer prices $3B bond offering (ET:NYSE)
feed.summary: Energy Transfer (ET) announced the pricing of a $3 billion bond offering. The offering is split into three tranches: $1 billion in senior notes due 2031 at 4.55%, $1 billion due 2036 at 5.35%, and $1 billion due 2056 at 6.30%. The offering prices for these notes are 99.830%, 99.933%, and 99.842% of face value, respectively.
